issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all edge cases such as empty file lists or permission errors.

scenarios.name: zip-directory-with-progress
scenarios.rationale: Both responses do not call the required createZipWithProgress function, so neither meets the rubric.

scenarios.name: stream-zip-to-http
scenarios.rationale: Response A uses the required streamZipResponse but omits the explicit headers, while Response B correctly sets headers and finalizes the archive but does not use streamZipResponse as mandated.
